/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-rtti -shared -Wl,-soname,libAssignment1.so -o libAssignment1.so CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/AlgebraicIdentity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/StrengthReduction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/MultiInstruction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/LocalOpts.cpp.o
